channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: China hosts Iran's top diplomat just days ahead of Trump's high-stakes visit
item.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi trip to Beijing on Wednesday marks the first time he has visited China since the beginning of the Iran war.

item.title: Trump pauses U.S. bid to guide ships out of Strait of Hormuz, cites Iran deal progress
item.description: President Donald Trump said he is pausing "Project Freedom," the U.S. military's bid to guide commercial ships out of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: AMD's stock soars 15% as data center growth pushes revenue and guidance past estimates
item.description: AMD's earnings report lands as investors rush into the stock on optimism that the AI boom is just getting started.

item.title: In the global AI race, a sanctioned Chinese firm says cheaper models can still win
item.description: As China’s AI competition intensifies, SenseTime is shifting toward multimodal AI, lower-cost models and overseas expansion to remain competitive, co-founder Lin Dahua said.

item.title: Small caps put on their best monthly showing since 2020. Bank of America says there's more upside ahead
item.description: The Russell 2000 surged in April. Bank of America highlights ETFs to play small caps and enhance returns.

item.title: Lufthansa faces nearly $2 billion in extra fuel costs amid Middle East conflict
item.description: Germany's largest airline, Lufthansa, is taking on additional fuel costs as the Middle East conflict poses 'enormous challenges.'

item.title: Samsung crossses $1 trillion valuation as AI frenzy drives historic rally, lifting shares over 15%
item.description: The rally comes after the company reported an over eightfold increase in first-quarter operating profits last week.

item.title: Ken Griffin: We will create jobs in Miami as a consequence of NYC Mayor Mamdani's wealth tax video
item.description: Ken Griffin, CEO of Citadel, reacts to New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's push to tax the rich, including a video filmed outside of Griffin's Manhattan apartment.

item.title: Super Micro stock jumps 18% on guidance beat as revenue more than doubles
item.description: Super Micro pointed to progress in U.S. manufacturing in issuing a stronger-than-expected quarterly forecast.

item.title: Oil prices fall as Trump pauses Hormuz escort effort
item.description: Oil prices fell after Trump said the U.S. would pause its naval escort endeavor in the Strait of Hormuz, raising hopes of a potential deal with Iran.

item.title: Iran doesn't have 'kamikaze dolphins,' Hegseth says. But marine mammals have a long history of military use
item.description: Several countries, including the U.S., have a history of using dolphins in conflict areas, though not as weapons.

item.title: Data suggests 'hiring recession' may be behind us — but the Iran war poses job market risks
item.description: Hiring activity increased in March, according to federal data issued Tuesday. However, the Iran war threatens to stall that progress in the job market.

item.title: Jim Cramer: Here's the list of AI winners to buy for 2026 and beyond
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said the data center and artificial intelligence boom is spreading far beyond tech companies and into nearly every corner of the market.

item.title: EV maker Lucid suspends production guidance amid incoming CEO's business review
item.description: Lucid Group said it will make moves to better align its production with customer demand for its luxury all-electric vehicles.

item.title: Spirit starts monthslong process of dismantling airline after biggest collapse in a generation
item.description: Spirit Airlines was back in bankruptcy court to start dismantling the airline.

item.title: Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy breaks from 'never sell' approach to the flagship crypto
item.description: Strategy is shifting from passive bitcoin accumulation to actively managing balance sheet to boost bitcoin per share value.

item.title: Micron zooms past $700 billion market cap as rally in memory stocks accelerates
item.description: Micron has emerged as one of the most valuable U.S. tech companies thanks to insatiable demand for memory that's needed in AI chips.

item.title: OpenAI trial: Brockman rebuts Musk's take on startup's history, recounts secret work for Tesla
item.description: OpenAI President Greg Brockman concluded his testimony on Tuesday as the blockbuster trial between the AI startup and Elon Musk rolled into its second week.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Advanced Micro Devices, Super Micro Computer, Arista Networks & more
item.description: See which stocks are posting big moves after the bell.

item.title: AMC to screen live concerts through Arena One partnership
item.description: More than 300 AMC locations in 89 markets across the U.S. will be programmed for live concert screenings. Tickets will range from $40 to $75.

item.title: Johnson & Johnson reaches a milestone for one of its most exciting pipeline products
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: Which Bilt credit card should you apply for? Here's how the Blue, Obsidian and Palladium compare
item.description: Bilt launched three new credit cards this past February, now earning rewards on rent and mortgages. CNBC Select breaks down which could be the best fit for you.

item.title: FDA withdrew studies finding Covid, shingles vaccines were safe
item.description: The studies were "withdrawn because the authors drew broad conclusions that were not supported by the underlying data," the spokesperson told CNBC.

item.title: Intel and Micron are poised to break major milestones
item.description: Options traders can't get enough of semiconductor stocks.

item.title: Jerome Powell making a 'significant mistake' by staying on at the Fed, Sen. Tim Scott says
item.description: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell has said he plans to remain a member of the Federal Reserve board after his term as chair expires this month.

item.title: Anthropic CEO warns of cyber ‘moment of danger’ as AI exposes thousands of vulnerabilities
item.description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warned AI has created a narrow window for software firms, governments and banks to fix tens of thousands of vulnerabilities.

item.title: Aluminum prices are surging. Here's how companies are handling the costs
item.description: Aluminum's surge since the start of the Iran war is creating cost pressures for some of America's largest companies.

item.title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite rose to fresh records on Tuesday, powered by falling oil prices and solid quarterly earnings reports.

item.title: SEC advances Trump-backed proposal to end mandatory quarterly earnings reports
item.description: The SEC formally proposed a rule change that would allow companies to file semiannual reports on a new form, 10-S, in place of the traditional quarterly10-Qs

item.title: Michael Burry sells GameStop after Ryan Cohen's hefty eBay bid: 'Never confuse debt for creativity'
item.description: The "Big Short" investor said the proposed deal's enormous leverage shattered the investment case he had been building.
